Welcome! 🎉 Replication Radar is built in the open, and contributors become part of the
team. Filling this in is all it takes to get started — no pressure on any field.

## A little about you
<!-- A sentence or two: who you are and what you do. -->

## What you'd like to help with
<!-- e.g. RSE feedback, the citation-graph angle, FAIR-software scoring, docs, testing,
     a topic you know well to stress-test the Radar — anything. -->

## Your details (for the team page)
- **Name (as you'd like to be credited):**
- **Role:**
- **Links (LinkedIn / GitHub / ORCID / website):**
- **Photo:** _optional — attach one here or link it, only if you'd like_

---

### Adding yourself (optional — we can do it for you)

The team page renders from Markdown, so adding yourself is two small files in a pull request:

1. Write your bio as Markdown in `site/bios/your-name.md` — a sentence, then a few bullets.
2. Add one entry to `site/team.json` (there's a copy-paste example on
   [the team page](https://openaire-hackathon.netlify.app/team.html) under "Join the team").

Prefer not to? Just fill in the details above and we'll add you. Either way — glad to have you. 💜
